'''jabhoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bird|bird]]". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-bh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bird|bird]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jabhoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbhereth|jæbhereth]] || [[word:jæbherej|jæbherej]] || [[word:jæbheresh|jæbheresh]] || [[word:jæbhere|jæbhere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabhobhoroth|jabhobhoroth]] || [[word:jabhobhoroj|jabhobhoroj]] || [[word:jabhobhorosh|jabhobhorosh]] || [[word:jabhobhoro|jabhobhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabhoroth|jabhoroth]] || [[word:jabhoroj|jabhoroj]] || [[word:jabhorosh|jabhorosh]] || [[word:jabhoro|jabhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabhofroth|jabhofroth]] || [[word:jabhofroj|jabhofroj]] || [[word:jabhofrosh|jabhofrosh]] || [[word:jabhofrof|jabhofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabhorotho|jabhorotho]] || [[word:jabhorojo|jabhorojo]] || [[word:jabhorosho|jabhorosho]] || [[word:jabhoroko|jabhoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabhoroth|jabhoroth]] || [[word:jabhoroj|jabhoroj]] || [[word:jabhorosh|jabhorosh]] || [[word:jabhoro|jabhoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabhorothol|jabhorothol]] || [[word:jabhorojol|jabhorojol]] || [[word:jabhoroshol|jabhoroshol]] || [[word:jabhorokol|jabhorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabhorothotho|jabhorothotho]] || [[word:jabhorojojo|jabhorojojo]] || [[word:jabhoroshosho|jabhoroshosho]] || [[word:jabhoroko|jabhoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabhorothon|jabhorothon]] || [[word:jabhorojon|jabhorojon]] || [[word:jabhoroshon|jabhoroshon]] || [[word:jabhorokon|jabhorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabhorothoro|jabhorothoro]] || [[word:jabhorojoro|jabhorojoro]] || [[word:jabhoroshoro|jabhoroshoro]] || [[word:jabhorokoro|jabhorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
